title: 3Zoo1Mgg8Zlaoaisfdbplxx1785Uaf
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, India produced approximately 139.2 billion kilowatt hours of electricity in June. This is down month-on-month by 5.2 billion kilowatt hours (-4%) but is up year-on-year by 12 billion kilowatt hours (10%). Noteworthy is that hydropower output ended up falling back into a year-on-year contraction, as we believed was likely to occur.
